headline: Parker Hannifin Corp (NYSE:PH) Excels as a Top "Caviar Cruise" Quality Screen Pick
summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) passes the "Caviar Cruise" quality screen with strong profitability, 75.3% ROIC, and 125.6% profit quality, making it a top long-term investment candidate.
